evidence: Line 128 now reads `hwc > 0 && hwc > 2 ? 7 : 6`; hwc=0 (unknown) returns 6 (conservative). Comment updated with CAP-7 reference.
Line 137 now includes explicit `hwc === 0` guard: `if (t === "simd" || hwc === 0 || hwc <= 2) return "fast"`. Unknown concurrency now takes the fast path.
Deferred per plan (false positive — probe bytes are compile-time constants, no current collision).

isEhProbe() added (tier-matrix.test.ts line 26-29, keyed on 0x19 with exclusion of 0xfd/0xfe). Wired into installProbeStubs (line 45). Test at line 169-175 asserts caps.wasmExceptions === true when exceptions=true passed.
beforeEach now has else branch (lines 91-93): `else { delete (globalAny as any).SharedArrayBuffer; }`. Symmetric with afterEach.
ADR draft written at undefined/sections/005/adr_draft/005-logic-6-invariant-checking-convention.md.
Deferred per plan (false positive — all four canUseThreadedWasm combinations are covered across test files).
Line 245 calls detectTier() first (caches _cachedTier) before the individual _probe* calls at lines 254-257. Comment at 243-244 documents the C-3/performance-1 fix explicitly.
ADR draft written at undefined/sections/005/adr_draft/005-performance-2-probe-result-caching.md.
Deferred per plan (false positive — bare navigator access is inside try/catch; ReferenceError would be caught).
Interface field changed to `libjxlVersion: string | null` (line 158). Return value changed to `null` (line 309). The contract now honestly represents 'not yet available'.
Return type narrowed to `4 | 6 | 7` (line 122), matching the three actually-reachable values.
JSDoc added at line 165: 'WebCodecs ImageDecoder class exists in this environment. Does NOT imply JXL support — use nativeJxlDecoder for that.' Semantic gap is now documented in the interface.
Deferred per plan (false positive — detectTier intentionally uses extended predicate for Node.js; not a true duplicate).
Deferred per plan (false positive — JSDoc at lines 89-92 already documents the ambiguity).
Deferred per plan (false positive — deterministic closed function; TypeScript enforces return type at compile time).
ADR draft written at undefined/sections/005/adr_draft/contracts-8-capabilities-field-contract-test.md.

_resetGen counter added (line 5), incremented in _resetCache() (line 8), passed as gen argument to computeCapabilities (line 227), checked after all awaits at lines 293-296. Stale results are discarded and a fresh computation is triggered.

tier.test.ts now imports the module first (line 20: `const mod = await import(...)`) BEFORE patching WebAssembly.validate (line 29). The global stub is only active during the synchronous tier/caps calls, not during the async import.

_gpuAdapterPromise is still cleared in _resetCache() but the _resetGen generation guard (concurrency-1 fix) prevents any in-flight computeCapabilities from storing a stale result back. Double GPU probe risk is contained by the generation check.

ADR draft written at undefined/sections/005/adr_draft/005-concurrency-4-timeout-abortsignal.md. The immediate timeout fixes (errors-2, errors-3) are confirmed; AbortSignal API is the remaining ADR question.

The catch block at lines 237-241 now has a comment referencing errors-7 for a future diagnostic channel, but no code change was made to surface the error. This task depends on errors-7 (ADR); deferred pending ADR resolution.
withTimeout wrapper applied at line 212: `await withTimeout(createImageBitmap(blob), 500, null)`. Hung probe now resolves to null after 500ms, returning false safely.
withTimeout wrapper applied at line 327: `await withTimeout(gpu.requestAdapter(), 2000, null)`. Stalled requestAdapter now resolves to null after 2000ms.

Lines 279-284 now check `e?.code` and re-throw when code is neither ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND nor MODULE_NOT_FOUND. SyntaxError, ABI mismatch, and I/O failures now surface instead of being silently swallowed.
Deferred per plan (false positive — bare navigator inside try/catch; ReferenceError caught safely).
Deferred per plan (false positive — WebCodecs spec defines isTypeSupported as returning Promise<boolean>; boolean coercion is correct).
ADR draft written at undefined/sections/005/adr_draft/005-errors-7-structured-diagnostic-channel.md.
withTimeout<T>() utility implemented at lines 175-181. Used by both errors-2 (createImageBitmap, 500ms) and errors-3 (requestAdapter, 2000ms) sites.
